meta.purpose: Iskandar Diagnosis Engine V1 - Epidemiology Prior Weight Layer (Annual)
meta.methodology: Bayesian prior from local disease burden. Weight = 1.0 + (prevalence_pct/100). Cap 1.35. Applied to matchScore in symptom-matcher.
meta.gender_source: LB1 gender ratios for 600 codes, default 35.5M/64.5F for 1330 codes
